def positive_wandb_mlflow_log_in_tight_loop():
    rule_id = "wandb_mlflow_log_in_tight_loop"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "wandb or mlflow metrics are logged in inner loops instead of batched or reported at coarser boundaries."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
